content.en:
The two Origin Ancestors are not fighting at the moment, they are just facing each other.

But Ye Tian knew very well that these two Origin Ancestors were not friends, but hostile relations, because the aura of both sides was locking on each other, and even distorted the void.

And they didn't allow other source beasts to get close, and all the source beasts that came close were killed by them.

"Those source beasts are too stupid, the two source ancestors are there, they are completely sent to death!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he also knew the reason, it must be the attraction of the seven-leaf black grass.

In normal times, no matter how stupid the source beast is, it will not offend the source ancestor, and it will definitely run away in fright, but if it is attracted by the seven-leaf black grass, it is estimated that they will completely lose the last bit of wisdom, and they will completely be covered with wisdom by greed, and they will go completely crazy.

It was precisely because of this that these weak source beasts dared to offend the two source beasts.

"What the hell is that black seven-leaf words, it actually attracted two origin ancestors, and the treasure that can make the origin ancestor wait here is absolutely extraordinary!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's a pity that he doesn't know this seven-leaf black grass.

"I'm far away, and those two Origin Ancestors are all focused on each other, and they won't pay too much attention to their surroundings. In addition, the Source Beast is not very good at souls, and I have used a lot of concealment secret techniques and stealth talents, as long as I don't move, even the Source Ancestor may not be able to easily see through my whereabouts. "

Ye Tian estimated that the chance of being discovered was very small.

Therefore, he did not leave, but waited.

Time passed little by little, and the source beasts in this area died one after another, almost turning this place into a source beast cemetery, countless source beasts died, and the necromantic qi began to grow at an incredible speed.

suddenly

Ye Tian sensed that the two Origin Ancestors had moved, and although they had not yet fought, the blood and qi power in their bodies had sprung up, and it was mighty, affecting a radius of hundreds of millions of miles.

"It's so strong!"

Ye Tian's expression changed slightly, the power of Yuan Ancestor's qi and blood was much, many times stronger than him, what kind of physical strength could such a qi and blood power have!

At this moment, the two Yuan Clans spoke.

Although they did not speak the universal language of the universe, the words spoken by such beings responded to heaven and earth and contained the rules of heaven and earth, so the powerful could understand their meaning, and Ye Tian would naturally be able to understand them.

"Zhumo, do you really want to snatch this Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass with me?"

One of the Yuan Ancestors said coldly.

"Qihao, the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass is such a rare treasure, and it is also a Qi Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass that is close to maturity, and now it has absorbed the blood of these countless source beasts, it is about to mature, you let me give up, why?" Zhu Mo replied in a cold voice.

"This place belongs to my territory, and the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass should belong to me!" he roared.

"Hahaha, ridiculous, the things in your territory belong to you, and I also said that the entire Origin Realm is my territory, so does that mean that the things in the entire Origin Realm belong to me?"

Zhumo is not afraid of branding at all, after all, they are all origin ancestors, and their strength is similar.

If it was the top source ancestor, it would leave immediately without saying a word, but the strength of the brand was similar to it, and now it had discovered this seven-leaf ancestral blood grass, once it got this seven-leaf ancestral blood grass, then its strength could go further.

Therefore, it was impossible for it to give up this seven-leaf ancestral blood grass.

Distance.

Ye Tian listened to the words of the two origin ancestors, and said secretly: "It turns out that this grass is called the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, and it is actually absorbing the blood of these countless source beasts, accelerating its maturity in a faster way!!"

He hadn't paid attention to the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass before, he had only focused on the two Origin Ancestors, so he didn't know about this situation.

"In this way, the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass is about to mature, can I take it?"

Ye Tian asked himself.

Of course, no matter what, he will not give up, and once he is given the slightest chance to take it, he will definitely make a move.

Rumble!!!

The two Origin Ancestors fought, and it seemed that they were afraid of destroying this Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, the two Origin Ancestors fought in the depths of the void, leaving only some strength to protect this piece of land, and to prevent other Source Beasts from approaching the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass.

Obviously, the purpose of the two Origin Ancestors is the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, no matter who wins or loses, they have to pick the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, if the Seven-Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass is destroyed, the meaning of their fight will be lost.

"Still have to wait!"

Ye Tian knew very well that even if the two Origin Ancestors fought in the void, the remaining power could still inflict heavy damage or even kill him in an instant.

Rumble!!!

A Source Emperor came, it saw the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, its eyes began to go crazy, and it rushed over as fast as it could, but before it could rush to the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass, a source ancestral power bombarded it.

With just one blow, the body of this Source Emperor began to collapse, turning into countless pieces, falling and dying.

"Sure enough, although this Source Emperor is only a weaker Source Emperor, it is also stronger than me, but I didn't expect it to die!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he still has some advantages over this Source Emperor, such as defense.

With the Chaos Origin Ancient Well, his defense should be relatively strong, and he also has a super god-level space-time talent, which this Origin Realm Source Beast cannot have.

In the Origin Realm, except for the strength talents, the other talents of the source beasts are relatively ordinary, and the source beasts of space-time talents are estimated to be extremely rare, not to mention the super-god-level space-time talents.

Therefore, this is one of Ye Tian's advantages.

"When those two Origin Ancestors fight to the white-hot stage, and then wait for the Seven Leaf Ancestral Blood Grass to fully mature, then this is my chance to make a move!"

Ye Tian knew very well that he only had one chance to make a move, and once he failed, he had to escape.

Although his realm is low and his strength is weak, his ability to escape is not comparable to other source beasts.

If the two supremes from the outside world were fighting here, he would definitely not dare to make up his mind, but the ability of the source beast to chase and kill was really too ordinary, and he couldn't get through the avenue, so he relied on brute force, even if it was the source ancestor level, he might not be able to catch up with him.
